name: codex-abaqus
description: MCP Server bridging Codex AI with Abaqus FEA. Submit jobs, read ODB results, model via Python API, and execute arbitrary Abaqus scripts.
author: abandon

ABAQUS_COMMAND.description: Path to Abaqus command (e.g. abaqus.bat). Auto-detected if not set.

ABAQUS_WORK_DIR.description: Working directory for Abaqus jobs and output files.

ABAQUS_CPUS.description: Default number of CPUs for job submission.
